title: High-fidelity microsecond-scale cellular imaging using two-axis compressed streak imaging fluorescence microscopy.
author: Keppler MA O'Connor SP Steelman ZA Liu X Liang J Yakovlev VV Bixler JN
content: S-EPMC12633632 PMC12633632 High-fidelity microsecond-scale cellular imaging using two-axis compressed streak imaging fluorescence microscopy. Compressed streak imaging (CSI) is a computational imaging strategy that can acquire video at over 150 trillion frames per second. Despite this achievement
